name: Hurricane Creek Park
content: Hurricane Creek is a nice hiking spot, located a short drive to the east of Tuscaloosa. It is a nice place to go hiking, for a run, or to swim in the Black Warrior river (though I have heard varying reports on the safety of the water). It may be possible to bike to Hurricane Creek from Tuscaloosa, though I have not tried this and have some doubts as to the comfort of such a ride.
